title: Find and Install an App
drDigitalIntro:
Let's put your app skills to the test!
• Search for an app, install it, manage permissions, and update another.
• Clean up an app you don't need anymore.
• You know the drill — let's go!

playgroundTask.goal: You searched, installed, updated, and deleted apps

steps.say: Search for 'weather' in the App Market.
The app needs camera and microphone access. Allow the permissions.
Go to My Apps to see your installed apps.
One of your apps has an update available. Update it.
You don't play Puzzle Quest anymore. Delete it.
Go back to the store to browse.

drDigitalSuccess:
You found, installed, updated, and deleted apps like a pro!

Now for real: on your own computer, open its app store and install WhatsApp — or if it's already there, check whether it needs an update.
drDigitalHint: Use the search bar to find apps, My Apps to manage them, and the trash icon to delete ones you don't need.
